lengthMeasurement.description: Canonical length measurement in millimeters, with optional source measurement preserved for traceability.

value.description: Canonical OVDS length value expressed in millimeters.

unit.description: Canonical OVDS unit for length measurements.

sourceValue.description: Original published length value before normalization.

sourceUnit.description: Original published unit for the source length value.

massMeasurement.description: Canonical mass measurement in kilograms, with optional source measurement preserved for traceability.

value.description: Canonical OVDS mass value expressed in kilograms.

unit.description: Canonical OVDS unit for mass measurements.

sourceValue.description: Original published mass value before normalization.

sourceUnit.description: Original published unit for the source mass value.

volumeMeasurement.description: Canonical volume measurement in liters, with optional source measurement preserved for traceability.

value.description: Canonical OVDS volume value expressed in liters.

unit.description: Canonical OVDS unit for volume measurements.

sourceValue.description: Original published volume value before normalization.

sourceUnit.description: Original published unit for the source volume value.

brakeType.description: Published brake type for an axle.

brakeSetup.description: Published front and rear brake configuration for the vehicle.

testCycle.description: Published test or certification cycle associated with a reported result. EPA aggregate label values may use 'epa', while source-cycle values such as FTP and HFET may be recorded directly when the publication distinguishes them.

resultScope.description: Driving scope covered by a reported result.

efficiencyResult.description: Published efficiency result for a specific cycle and scope.

value.description: Normalized published value for this efficiency result.

unit.description: Unit associated with the efficiency value.

isPrimary.description: Indicates whether this is the primary published efficiency result for the vehicle.

costOfOwnershipEstimate.description: Published cost-of-ownership estimate for a ten-year horizon.

ownershipPeriodYears.description: Ownership horizon in years for this estimate.

distancePerYear.description: Distance driven per year in the ownership estimate.

distanceUnit.description: Unit associated with the annual distance value.

currency.description: ISO 4217 currency code used for the cost values.

energyCost.description: Projected ten-year fuel or electricity cost.

otherCost.description: Optional projected ten-year ownership cost outside energy and maintenance.

rangeResult.description: Published driving range result for a specific cycle and scope.

unit.description: Unit associated with the range value.

isPrimary.description: Indicates whether this is the primary published range result for the vehicle.

emissionsResult.description: Published emissions result for a specific cycle and scope.

unit.description: Unit associated with the emissions value.

isPrimary.description: Indicates whether this is the primary published emissions result for the vehicle.

accelerationResult.description: Published acceleration result for the vehicle.

value.description: Published acceleration time for the stated metric.

unit.description: Unit associated with the acceleration result.

isPrimary.description: Indicates whether this is the primary published acceleration result for the vehicle.

topSpeedResult.description: Published top speed result for the vehicle.

unit.description: Unit associated with the top speed value.

isPrimary.description: Indicates whether this is the primary published top speed result for the vehicle.

torqueResult.description: Published torque result for the vehicle.

value.description: Published torque value for the vehicle.

unit.description: Unit associated with the torque value.

isPrimary.description: Indicates whether this is the primary published torque result for the vehicle.

powerResult.description: Published power result for the vehicle.

value.description: Published power value for the vehicle.

unit.description: Unit associated with the power value.

isPrimary.description: Indicates whether this is the primary published power result for the vehicle.

chargingPort.description: Published charging port configuration for the vehicle.

currentType.description: Current type supported by this charging port.

connector.description: Connector standard used by this charging port.

location.description: Published physical location of the charging port on the vehicle.

chargingCapability.description: Published charging capability for a current type.

maxPowerKw.description: Maximum published charging power in kilowatts.

maxVoltageV.description: Maximum published charging voltage in volts.

maxCurrentA.description: Maximum published charging current in amperes.

phases.description: Number of AC phases supported when applicable.

chargeTimeResult.description: Published charging time result for a specific charging scenario.

currentType.description: Current type used for this charging-time result.

connector.description: Connector standard associated with this charging-time result.

supplyContext.description: Published supply context for this charging-time result.

sourceStateOfChargePercent.description: Starting battery state of charge percentage for the published charging-time result.

targetStateOfChargePercent.description: Ending battery state of charge percentage for the published charging-time result.

durationMinutes.description: Published time required to move from the source state of charge to the target state of charge.

powerKw.description: Charging power associated with the published charging-time result when stated by the source.

isPrimary.description: Indicates whether this is the primary published charging-time result for its current type.

note.description: Optional published note or qualifier for the charging-time result.

charging.description: Published charging interfaces, capabilities, and charging-time results for the vehicle configuration.

ports.description: Published charging ports available on the vehicle.

chargeTimes.description: Published charging-time results for specific connectors, power levels, and state-of-charge windows.

region.description: Market or regulatory region associated with the compliance record.

standard.description: Name or code of the standard, certification, or rule set.

classification.description: Classification, rating, or level under the named standard.

isPrimary.description: Indicates whether this is the primary compliance record in its category.

particulateFilter.description: Published particulate-filter fitment for the vehicle when applicable.

present.description: Indicates whether the vehicle is equipped with a particulate filter.

type.description: Particulate-filter type when the vehicle is equipped with one.

emissionsControls.description: Published emissions-control hardware and diagnostics fitted to the vehicle configuration.

catalyticConverter.description: Indicates whether the vehicle is equipped with a catalytic converter.

catalyticConverterCount.description: Number of catalytic converters when published.

oxygenSensor.description: Indicates whether the vehicle is equipped with oxygen sensors.

oxygenSensorCount.description: Number of oxygen sensors when published.

egr.description: Indicates whether the vehicle uses an exhaust gas recirculation system.

airPump.description: Indicates whether the vehicle uses a secondary air injection pump.

onboardDiagnostics.description: Published onboard-diagnostics standard for emissions monitoring.

durabilityStandard.description: Published durability standard associated with the emissions-control system.

powertrainEnergySource.description: Energy source used by the powertrain.

source.description: Primary stored or supplied energy source.

isPrimary.description: Indicates whether this is the primary energy source for the vehicle.

powertrainEnergyStorage.description: Energy storage component used by the powertrain.

batteryPackId.description: Battery pack identifier when the storage type is battery_pack, using a deterministic uppercase slug.

fuelCapacity.description: Fuel tank capacity when the storage type is fuel_tank.

isPrimary.description: Indicates whether this is the primary energy storage component.

powertrainEnergyConverter.description: Component that converts stored or supplied energy into usable propulsion energy.

engineId.description: Internal combustion engine identifier when the converter type is combustion_engine, using a deterministic uppercase slug.

fuelCellStackId.description: Fuel cell stack identifier when the converter type is fuel_cell_stack, using a deterministic uppercase slug.

role.description: How this component participates in the powertrain.

isPrimary.description: Indicates whether this is the primary energy conversion component.

powertrainTractionMotor.description: Traction motor used to deliver torque to the driven wheels.

electricMotorId.description: Electric motor identifier using a deterministic uppercase slug.

isPrimary.description: Indicates whether this is the primary traction motor.

powertrain.description: Technical propulsion configuration for this vehicle, modeled by energy role rather than a single engine concept.

architecture.description: Primary powertrain architecture for the vehicle.

energySources.description: Stored or supplied energy sources available to the vehicle.

energyStorage.description: Energy storage components used by the vehicle.

energyConverters.description: Components that convert energy sources into usable propulsion energy.

tractionMotors.description: Electric traction motors used to drive the wheels.

driveType.description: Driven axle layout for this powertrain configuration.

id.description: OVDS vehicle identifier for a concrete published configuration record.

lineage.description: Commercial and historical lineage for this vehicle configuration.

makeId.description: Make identifier for the vehicle brand, using a deterministic uppercase slug.

modelId.description: Stable model or nameplate identifier using a deterministic uppercase slug, typically derived from make and model.

platformId.description: Optional platform identifier shared across one or more makes or groups, using a deterministic uppercase slug.

generationId.description: Optional generation identifier shared across multiple model years, using a deterministic uppercase slug derived from the model hierarchy.

modelYear.description: Commercial model year for this vehicle configuration.

variantId.description: Optional commercial variant or trim identifier for this model year, using a deterministic uppercase slug. A variant may still correspond to multiple technical configurations.

submodelId.description: Optional legacy or transitional submodel identifier using a deterministic uppercase slug.

configuration.description: Concrete technical configuration for the vehicle offered in this lineage entry.

transmissionId.description: Transmission identifier when applicable, using a deterministic uppercase slug.

bodyStyle.description: Published body style for the configuration.

origin.description: Published assembly origin for this concrete vehicle configuration.

assemblyCountry.description: ISO 3166-1 alpha-2 country code for the country where the vehicle is assembled.

assemblyRegion.description: Optional published state, province, or region where the vehicle is assembled.

assemblyPlant.description: Optional published assembly plant or factory name for the vehicle.

specs.description: Core vehicle specifications expressed in canonical SI units, with optional source measurements preserved for traceability.

length.description: Overall vehicle length measured from bumper to bumper.

width.description: Overall vehicle width measured across the outermost body points.

height.description: Overall vehicle height measured from the top of the body to the ground.

wheelbase.description: Distance between the centers of the front and rear wheels.

frontTrackWidth.description: Distance between the centers of the left and right front wheels.

rearTrackWidth.description: Distance between the centers of the left and right rear wheels.

footprint.description: Published vehicle footprint measurement as reported by the source or applicable standard.

turningCircle.description: Minimum turning circle required for a U-turn.

groundClearance.description: Published minimum ground clearance for the vehicle.

curbWeight.description: Vehicle curb weight without occupants or cargo.

maxLoad.description: Maximum combined occupant and cargo load.

doorCount.description: Published number of side-access doors for the vehicle body.

passengerCapacity.description: Maximum designed seating capacity for passengers.

payloadCapacity.description: Maximum payload capacity for occupants and cargo.

cargoCapacity.description: Published cargo or luggage compartment capacity.

brakes.description: Published front and rear brake types.

performance.description: Published performance and certification results for the vehicle.

efficiency.description: Efficiency results by cycle and scope.

range.description: Range results by cycle and scope.

emissions.description: Emissions results by cycle and scope.

torque.description: Published torque results for the vehicle.

power.description: Published power results for the vehicle.

costOfOwnership.description: Published cost-of-ownership estimates kept separate from measured or certified performance results.

safety.description: Normalized safety features for this vehicle configuration.

compliance.description: Regulatory or certification classifications associated with the vehicle.

attributes.description: Additional free-form attributes used only as an escape hatch for normalized public-source data that does not yet have a dedicated OVDS field.
